title: Vegetta777 Totem
description: Swap out the Totem of Immortality for a customized version with the Vegetta777 skin. Perfect for fans who want to add a special, nostalgic touch to their Minecraft adventures. Compatible with both vanilla and mod versions.
body:
![Vegetta777 totem gif](https://i.imgur.com/H1ACyae.gif)

Swap out the Totem of Immortality for a customized version with the Vegetta777 skin. Perfect for fans who want to add a special, nostalgic touch to their Minecraft adventures. Compatible with both vanilla and mod versions.
![vegetta77 totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be5d697f679798e13c6552838d130b5f0e721543_0.webp)
